name: Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine oats, nuts, brown sugar, and margarine in a bowl; mix well.
3. Press mixture firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate, forming a 1/2-inch rim around the edge.
4. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown; cool.
5. In a large mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, and vanilla; beat at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until set; cool on a wire rack.
9. Chill in the refrigerator several hours before serving.
10. Garnish with sliced strawberries, if desired.
